full_text:
Liu Chen 劉諶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Chen (劉諶)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Liu Shan’s fifth son. Rather than surrender to Wei, he committed suicide. Liu Chen was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Liu Chen lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
